name: Barley Salad with Squash (Mf)
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 2 to 3 quart saucepan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
2. Add the barley and stir until it smells toasty.
3. Remove the saucepan from the heat and add water (it will bubble up vigorously). Return the saucepan to the heat and cover.
4. Cook for about 20 to 25 minutes or until the barley has absorbed the liquid and is just tender.
5. Transfer the cooked barley to a sieve, drain under cold water, pat dry, and set aside.
6. While the barley is cooking, peel, halve, and seed the cucumbers and cut into 1/2 inch half moons. Halve and seed the zucchini and yellow squash, cut into 1/2 inch half moons, parboil for a minute, drain, and pat dry.
7. In a mixing bowl combine mayonnaise, vinegar, dill, salt, and pepper; season well.
8. Add the cooked barley, cucumbers, and squash to the dressing and toss well.
9. Adjust seasoning as needed.
10. On the outside edge of a serving platter, make a ring of drained sliced pickled beets. Pile the barley salad in the middle and center some watercress leaves.
Yield: 4 servings
